_disclaimer: SPECULATIVE forward conviction-research over a live-discovered small/mid-cap universe. NOT a backtested edge; small-caps carry liquidity, fraud and total-loss risk. Research leads, you decide. Manual trades only.
_method: Four+ Bigdata.com smart sweeps (under-the-radar cheap improvers; growing backlog/accelerating revenue; based-out post-IPO; insider buying + rising estimates; plus beat-and-raise and defense-backlog sweeps). Tickers extracted from chunks, then scored on Bigdata company tearsheets. Anti-hype guard dropped FTRE (+257% 1Y), ONDS (+307% 1Y, ~$4B cap) and PDYN (Q1 revenue missed -28%, improvement not yet in the numbers); SRAD/IAG dropped as non-US.

discoveries.name: Collegium Pharmaceutical Inc.
discoveries.valuation: ~5x forward EPS (next-4Q EPS ~$7.7 vs $36.6 price); EV/EBITDA ~7-17x; FCF yield ~8%
discoveries.thesis: A profitable specialty-pain pharma trading at roughly 5x forward earnings with an ~8% free-cash-flow yield, sitting only a third of the way up its 52-week range after a ~27% 6-month decline and now basing (3M +13%, 1M +10%). Q1 beat (EPS $1.76 vs $1.52, +16%; revenue +5%) and forward EPS keeps stepping up, yet the consensus $58 target implies ~59% upside. This is the cheap-and-quietly-improving setup the screen hunts for: hated, neglected, cash-generative, and starting to turn before the crowd notices.
discoveries.key_risk: Concentrated in opioid/pain franchises (Xtampza, Nucynta) facing eventual loss of exclusivity and opioid-litigation/ESG overhang; the cheap multiple partly prices a declining base, so execution on the pipeline/M&A matters.
early_signals: Flagged in small-cap A+ profitability screen (Jun 2026)

news.headline: Small-caps with top A+ profitability grade (Collegium named) as US margins near record highs
Collegium Q1: EPS $1.76 vs $1.52 est, revenue $193.5M (+4.9% beat)

discoveries.name: CorMedix Inc.
discoveries.valuation: Early-profitability ramp; consensus target $14 (~78% upside); turning GAAP-profitable as DefenCath scales
discoveries.thesis: DefenCath (catheter-related bloodstream-infection prevention) is in a sharp commercial ramp: Q1 revenue $127.4M crushed the $105M estimate (+21%) and EPS $0.43 beat by 23%, flipping the company to profitability. Yet the stock is down ~36% over the year and sits at just 19% of its 52-week range, basing near lows (3M +17%). All 8 covering analysts rate it Buy with a $14 target (~78% upside) — a genuinely early, under-followed inflection.
discoveries.key_risk: Single-product concentration on DefenCath — any reimbursement, competitive, or adoption stumble hits the whole thesis; small float makes it volatile and total-loss-capable.
early_signals: Flipped to profitability on DefenCath ramp
Named in small-cap A+ profitability screen (Jun 2026)

news.headline: CorMedix Q1: revenue $127.4M vs $105M est (+21%), EPS $0.43 vs $0.35 (+23%)

discoveries.name: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc.
discoveries.valuation: ~12-13x forward EPS (next-4Q EPS ~$0.69 vs $8.66); consensus target $10 (~15% upside)
discoveries.thesis: Home-based care platform (pediatric private-duty nursing, home health & hospice, medical solutions) riding a structural shift of care into the home. Q1 beat hard (EPS $0.18 vs $0.13, +38%; revenue $647.9M, +6% beat) and forward EPS keeps rising, while the stock trades around 12x forward earnings — cheap for the growth. Re-accelerating (1M +18%, 3M +38%) after a flat six months.
discoveries.key_risk: Heavy leverage (net debt / EBITDA ~16x) and Medicaid/reimbursement-rate sensitivity; high beta (~1.9) means sharp drawdowns if rates or volumes disappoint.
early_signals: Named in small-cap A+ profitability screen (Jun 2026)

news.headline: Aveanna Q1: EPS $0.18 vs $0.13 est (+38%), revenue $647.9M (+5.7% beat)

discoveries.name: Smith & Wesson Brands Inc.
discoveries.valuation: ~30x forward EPS on trough/cyclical earnings (FY27 EPS ~$0.50); EV/EBITDA ~24x; consensus target $16.5
discoveries.thesis: Cash-generative firearms maker emerging from a cyclical demand trough: Q4 blew past estimates (EPS $0.36 vs $0.225, +60%; revenue $178.4M, +15% beat) and forward EPS ramps steeply into FY27. Only 4 analysts cover it (genuinely under-followed) and it has been basing for three months after a strong late-2025 move. A cyclical-recovery + buyback/dividend story the crowd has stopped watching.
discoveries.key_risk: Firearms demand is cyclical and politically/seasonally swingy; the stock already ran ~75% over the trailing year, so the easy re-rating may be behind it and the forward P/E is not cheap on normalized earnings.
early_signals: Forward EPS ramping into FY27 recovery
Based out over 3 months after 2025 run

discoveries.name: BigBear.ai Holdings Inc.
discoveries.thesis: Defense/national-security AI decision-support play that is deeply out of favor — down ~49% over the year and pinned at 7% of its 52-week range — exactly when its contract backlog is building (+14% QoQ to ~$282M, incl. a $53M classified sole-source award) and management guides to ~17% revenue growth for 2026. A genuinely early, contrarian bet on the next leg of Pentagon AI spending, before sentiment turns.
discoveries.key_risk: Still meaningfully unprofitable with small revenue (~$140M) versus an $8x sales multiple; reliant on government appropriations timing and prone to heavy share dilution — high total-loss risk.
early_signals: Cited in 'under-the-radar defense tech small caps with real Pentagon contracts' (Jun 2026)

discoveries.name: Apogee Enterprises Inc.
discoveries.valuation: ~16x forward EPS (next-4Q EPS ~$3.1 vs $48.9); EV/EBITDA ~28x; consensus target $46 (below price)
discoveries.thesis: Architectural glass/metal and performance-surfaces maker that just posted a clean Q1 beat-and-raise (EPS $0.57 vs $0.43, +33%; revenue $342.7M, +3% beat) and popped 15%. Only 6 analysts cover it and forward EPS is stepping higher, a reshoring/non-residential-construction beneficiary that is still thinly followed.
discoveries.key_risk: Shares already ran ~50% in three months and sit at 90% of the 52-week range with the consensus $46 target BELOW the current price — much of the good news may be priced in, and the business is tied to cyclical commercial construction.
